untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of earnings announcements and material changes in expected earnings forecasts. These are corporate event triggers and fundamental data points not available in the allowed technical indicator list. The signal also references 'gradual investor awareness' which cannot be operationalized with only price/volume technical indicators. Parameters (lookback_period, threshold, half_life, backtest_sharpe, backtest_period) are marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be inferred.
translation_notes: Attempted to proxy PEAD momentum with positive/negative returns combined with above-average volume execution patterns, split into LONG and SHORT contexts. However, this is a weak substitute for the actual earnings announcement event detection and forward-looking earnings revision metrics that define true PEAD exploitation. A proper implementation requires access to earnings event calendars and consensus earnings forecast data.
